description:
**fz-dps.E2**: drop uniform `emit_return()` branch for Dst specs.

**What**: once q9g.3 has activated Dst classification, the uniform return path (writes frame slot 1, returns frame ptr) is only used by non-Dst specs. The `if return_reprs[my_sid] == Dst(...)` branch in `emit_return` for Dst specs is now dead — collapse the conditional. The uniform path stays for Tagged/RawInt/RawF64 specs.

**CLIF impact**: compiler-side reduction (one fewer branch in emit_terminator). Runtime CLIF unchanged — it's already set by C2 inside q9g.3.

**Removes**: the dead Dst arm in `emit_return` (or equivalent — exact site to be confirmed during landing).

**Tests**: existing tests pass; assert any-typed (non-Dst) specs still use the uniform path; Dst specs continue producing the store-through-dst form from q9g.3.

**Precondition**: q9g.3 — must have shipped Dst specs to production for this dead-branch removal to be safe.

comments.text: subsumed by fz-q9g.3 (CD-bundle): emit_return cleanup is natural completion of Term::Return
Rewritten 2026-05-18: now strictly a post-activation cleanup. Cannot land until q9g.3 has shipped real Dst specs to production.

title: fz-dps.E2: drop uniform emit_return() for Dst specs
